creator: media@gaogroupinc.com
text:
Toronto, Canada - GAO Instruments (www.GAOInstruments.com) is offering its ADSL2+ tester with a powerful test set providing all test functions needed in the field, including upstream or downstream rate measurement, error count, digital multi meter (DMM) test functions, MODEM simulation, PING and trace testing. 
This well-designed ADSL2+ tester, model A0300024, is designed for ADSL/ADSL2+ installation and maintenance. Measurements can be carried out immediately with a simple push of the "Auto Test" key. The intelligent tester provides various voice alarms and LED indications and also provides an auto-off function for energy-saving. The embedded chipset can be upgraded via Ethernet interface to meet the development of ADSL standards enhancing the return on investment for this device. It has built-in Ni-MH rechargeable batteries featuring a quick charge time of less than 2.5h. These features together with its compact size make the tester a valuable tool for field technicians.

About GAO Instruments
GAO Instruments (www.GAOInstruments.com) is a global leader in research, development and manufacturing of high performance telecommunication testers, electronic measurement instruments and other test and measurement devices.
